_publications._publicationTitle: Mass spectrometric insights into the protein composition of human cutaneous neurofibromas: comparison of neurofibromas with the overlying skin.

_contextSnippet: When the samples from all individuals were pooled into a single analysis, subclusters based on tissue type rather than patient emerged, indicating tissue-specific patterns of protein expression shared by multiple individuals
details: Successfully performed hierarchical clustering analysis showing tissue-specific patterns of protein expression and enabled statistical analysis of GO terms with confidence intervals
